name: douban-skill
description: > Export and sync Douban (豆瓣) book/movie/music/game collections to local CSV files via Frodo API. Supports full export (all history) and RSS incremental sync (recent items). Use when the user wants to export Douban reading/watching/listening/gaming history, back up their Douban data, set up incremental sync, or mentions 豆瓣/douban collections. Triggers on: 豆瓣, douban, 读书记录, 观影记录, 书影音, 导出豆瓣.
author: daymade
